name: Grimgar of Fantasy and Ash
original_name: 灰と幻想のグリムガル
overview: When Haruhiro awakens, he’s in the dark surrounded by people who have no memory of where they came from or how they got there. As the darkness fades, a fantastic new world called “Grimgar” appears before them and their adventure begins—but first, they’ll have to choose their guild, class, and special abilities.

trailers.title: Grimgar Ashes and Illusions - Official Trailer (Dub)
